name: Respect Affects Gameplay
author: xiting910
description: Stops STS2 from blindly marking the game as modded just because any mod is loaded. Scans mod assemblies to detect actual game content (cards, relics, heroes, etc.), and only treats the game as modded when it truly matters. Respects each mod's affects_gameplay flag for overall modded state, isolates save files only for content mods, and warns when a mod is mislabeled.
